# Angular GEMS SDK — Comprehensive AI Context (llms.txt)

> VERSION: 1.1.0 | ANGULAR: 20+ | PACKAGE: @gabriel-mdias/angular-gems-sdk

This document is the single source of truth for any AI model generating code
that uses or integrates with the GEMS SDK. Read it in full before producing
any Angular template, component, or service.

---

## 1. IRON RULES (never violate)

1. **Standalone only** — every component you create must be `standalone: true`.
   Never generate or reference `NgModule`.
2. **Constructor injection** — always inject services via `constructor(private svc: MyService)`.
   NEVER use the `inject()` function in components or services you create.
3. **Signals API** — use `input<T>()`, `output<T>()`, `model<T>()`, `computed()`, `signal()`.
   Never use the legacy `@Input()` / `@Output()` decorators.
4. **Separate files** — if template or styles exceed 5 lines, they MUST be
   in their own `.html` / `.css` file. No giant inline templates.
5. **CSS Variables only** — never hardcode hex colors (`#3b82f6`). Use
   `var(--gems-primary-500)`, `var(--gems-danger-500)`, `var(--gems-spacing-md)`, etc.
6. **Use SDK components** — never render raw `<input>`, `<select>`, `<textarea>`, `<button>`,
   or `<table>` elements when an equivalent GEMS component exists.
7. **ReactiveForms** — all form fields must use `[formGroup]` + `formControlName`.
   Template-driven `[(ngModel)]` is acceptable only inside SDK internals.

---

## 2. IMPORT PATHS

```typescript
// The package root is the entry point for everything except auth
// (no /components, /services, /http, /core/theme secondary entry points —
// those all resolve from the root). Everything below except auth is
// imported from '@gabriel-mdias/angular-gems-sdk' directly.
import { GemsInputTextComponent, GemsAlertService, provideGemsTheme, provideGemsHttp } from '@gabriel-mdias/angular-gems-sdk';

// Auth is the ONE real secondary entry point (v1.1.0+), kept separate so
// keycloak-angular is only loaded by apps that use it:
import { gemsRoleGuard, GemsHasRoleDirective, provideGemsKeycloak } from '@gabriel-mdias/angular-gems-sdk/auth';
```

The single CSS import is also from the package root:
```css
@import "@gabriel-mdias/angular-gems-sdk/styles.css";
```

---

## 3. THEMING & SETUP

### 3.1 Bootstrap (app.config.ts)
```typescript
import { provideGemsTheme } from '@gabriel-mdias/angular-gems-sdk';

export const appConfig: ApplicationConfig = {
  providers: [
    provideGemsTheme({
      primary: '#0B5FFF',
      secondary: '#4A5568',
      tertiary: '#E2E8F0',
      background: '#F7FAFC',
      // optional: success, danger, warning, info
    }),
  ],
};
```

### 3.2 Global styles (styles.css)
```css
@import "@gabriel-mdias/angular-gems-sdk/styles.css";
```

### 3.3 Key CSS Variables
| Token | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `--gems-primary-500` … `--gems-primary-900` | Primary palette |
| `--gems-danger-500` | Error / destructive |
| `--gems-warning-500` | Warning |
| `--gems-success-500` | Success |
| `--gems-info-500` | Informational |
| `--gems-spacing-xs` … `--gems-spacing-xl` | Layout spacing |
| `--gems-radius-sm` / `--gems-radius-md` | Border radius |
| `--gems-font-size-sm` / `--gems-font-size-md` | Typography |
| `--gems-transition-fast` / `--gems-transition-normal` | Animation speed |

---

## 4. FORM COMPONENTS (ControlValueAccessor)

All form components implement `ControlValueAccessor`. Use with `formControlName`
inside a `[formGroup]`. Each one automatically shows `:host.ng-invalid.ng-touched`
styling (red border + red label).

### 4.1 gems-input-text
```html
<gems-input-text
  label="E-mail"
  formControlName="email"
  type="email"
  icon="fa-solid fa-envelope"
  placeholder="user@example.com"
  [required]="true"
  [maxlength]="100"
  hint="Informe o e-mail corporativo">
</gems-input-text>
<gems-field-error [control]="form.get('email')"></gems-field-error>
```
**Inputs:** `label`, `placeholder`, `type` (text|email|number|tel|url|search),
`icon` (FontAwesome class), `disabled`, `required`, `maxlength`, `hint`.
**Value type:** `string`

### 4.2 gems-input-password
```html
<gems-input-password
  label="Senha"
  formControlName="password"
  placeholder="Digite sua senha"
  [required]="true">
</gems-input-password>
```
**Inputs:** `label`, `placeholder`, `id`, `required`.
**Outputs:** `valueChange`.
**Value type:** `string`. Has built-in visibility toggle button.

### 4.3 gems-input-date
```html
<gems-input-date
  label="Data de Nascimento"
  formControlName="birthDate"
  format="dayMonthYear"
  [required]="true">
</gems-input-date>
```
**Inputs:** `label`, `placeholder`, `id`, `required`, `format`.
**Formats:** `'dayMonthYear'` (DD/MM/YYYY → YYYY-MM-DD), `'fullDate'` (DD/MM/YYYY HH:mm → ISO),
`'monthYear'` (MM/YYYY → YYYY-MM), `'year'` (YYYY).
**Value type:** `string` (always ISO backend format).
Built-in validation: `incompleteDate`, `invalidDate`.
> Deprecated: the old PT-BR values (`formato` input, `'diaMesAno'|'fullData'|'mesAno'|'ano'`) still work but should not be used in new code — use `format` with the English values above.

### 4.4 gems-input-mask
```html
<gems-input-mask
  label="Telefone"
  formControlName="phone"
  maskType="phone"
  icon="fa-solid fa-phone"
  [required]="true">
</gems-input-mask>
```
**Inputs:** `label`, `placeholder`, `id`, `required`, `maskType`, `icon`.
**Mask types:** `'cep'` (99999-999), `'phone'` ((99) 99999-9999),
`'rg'` (99.999.999-9), `'email'` (no mask, pass-through).
**Value type:** `string` (raw digits, no formatting).
> Deprecated: `maskType="telefone"` still works but is a legacy PT-BR alias for `'phone'` — use `'phone'` in new code.

### 4.5 gems-input-document
```html
<gems-input-document
  label="CPF/CNPJ"
  formControlName="document"
  documentType="auto"
  [required]="true">
</gems-input-document>
```
**Inputs:** `label`, `placeholder`, `id`, `required`, `documentType`, `icon`.
**Document types:** `'auto'` (detects by length), `'cpf'`, `'cnpj'`.
**Value type:** `string` (raw digits). Shares CSS from `gems-input-mask`.

### 4.6 gems-select
```html
<gems-select
  label="Status"
  formControlName="status"
  [options]="statusOptions"
  placeholder="Selecione..."
  [required]="true">
</gems-select>
```
**Inputs:** `label`, `placeholder`, `disabled`, `required`, `options`.
**Options model:** `GemsSelectOption { label: string; value: unknown; disabled?: boolean }`.
**Value type:** `unknown` (the selected option's `value`).

### 4.7 gems-textarea
```html
<gems-textarea
  label="Observações"
  formControlName="notes"
  [rows]="5"
  [maxlength]="500"
  [autoResize]="true">
</gems-textarea>
```
**Inputs:** `label`, `placeholder`, `rows`, `maxlength`, `disabled`, `required`, `autoResize`.
**Value type:** `string`. Shows character counter when `maxlength` is set.

### 4.8 gems-input-checkbox
```html
<!-- Switch (default) -->
<gems-input-checkbox
  label="Ativo"
  formControlName="active"
  [isSwitch]="true">
</gems-input-checkbox>

<!-- Classic checkbox -->
<gems-input-checkbox
  label="Aceito os termos"
  formControlName="terms"
  [isSwitch]="false"
  topLabel="Termos de uso">
</gems-input-checkbox>
```
**Inputs:** `label`, `topLabel`, `alignWithInputs`, `isSwitch` (default true).
**Outputs:** `valueChange`.
**Value type:** `boolean`.

### 4.9 gems-input-range
```html
<gems-input-range
  formControlName="priceRange"
  type="number"
  placeholderMin="Min"
  placeholderMax="Max"
  separator="até">
</gems-input-range>
```
**Inputs:** `type` ('number'|'date'), `placeholderMin`, `placeholderMax`, `separator`.
**Value type:** `GemsRangeValue { min: string|number|null; max: string|number|null }`.

### 4.10 gems-field-error
```html
<gems-field-error
  [control]="form.get('fieldName')"
  [messages]="{ required: 'Campo obrigatório' }">
</gems-field-error>
```
**Always** place this immediately after any input that has validators.
**Inputs:** `control` (AbstractControl), `messages` (optional override map).
**Default messages (PT-BR):** required, email, minlength, maxlength, min, max, pattern.
Shows message only when control is `invalid` AND (`touched` OR `dirty`).

---

## 5. FORM LAYOUT

### 5.1 gems-form-card
```html
<gems-form-card title="Dados Pessoais" icon="fa-solid fa-user" [isLoading]="loading">
  <div gems-form-card-actions>
    <button class="btn-primary" (click)="save()">Salvar</button>
  </div>

  <!-- default slot = body -->
  <form [formGroup]="form">
    <gems-input-text label="Nome" formControlName="name"></gems-input-text>
  </form>

  <div gems-form-card-footer>
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="cancel()">Cancelar</button>
    <button class="btn-save" type="submit" (click)="save()">Salvar</button>
  </div>
</gems-form-card>
```
**Inputs:** `title`, `subtitle`, `icon`, `isLoading`.
**Slots:** `[gems-form-card-title]`, `[gems-form-card-subtitle]`,
`[gems-form-card-actions]`, `[gems-form-card-footer]`, default (body).

### 5.2 Button CSS classes (gems-global.css)
**Preferred way to render buttons.** Use these classes directly on native `<button>`
elements for standard actions — this is what the reference app uses exclusively:
- `btn-primary` — primary action (save, submit)
- `btn-secondary` — secondary action
- `btn-cancel` — cancel / back
- `btn-save` — alias for primary save
- `btn-danger` — destructive action
- `btn-info` — informational action
- `btn-warning` — warning action
- `btn-success` — success / confirm action
- `btn-novo` — "new/create" action
Never create custom `.my-button` classes. Do not mix these classes with `<gems-button>`
in the same snippet — pick one style per screen/form.

---

## 6. GEMS-BUTTON COMPONENT

Use `<gems-button>` only when you need built-in **loading** or **icon** state that
the `.btn-*` classes (section 5.2) don't provide. It renders a native `<button>`
internally and has **no custom output** — `(click)` works via native DOM bubbling,
not an `@Output()`. Never mix `<gems-button>` and `.btn-*` classes in the same form/screen.

```html
<gems-button label="Salvar" variant="primary" [loading]="isSaving" (click)="save()"></gems-button>
<gems-button label="Excluir" variant="danger" icon="fa-solid fa-trash"></gems-button>
<gems-button icon="fa-solid fa-plus" ariaLabel="Adicionar" variant="ghost"></gems-button>
```
**Inputs:** `label`, `variant` (primary|secondary|tertiary|danger|ghost|link),
`type` (button|submit|reset), `icon`, `iconPosition` (left|right),
`loading`, `disabled`, `ariaLabel`.
**Outputs:** none — bind `(click)` directly; it bubbles from the internal `<button>`.

---

## 7. DATA DISPLAY

### 7.1 gems-table
```html
<gems-table
  [columns]="columns"
  [data]="rows"
  [actions]="tableActions"
  [totalRecords]="total"
  [page]="page"
  [size]="size"
  [isLoading]="loading"
  (pageChange)="onPageChange($event)"
  (actionClick)="onAction($event)">
</gems-table>
```

**Column model:**
```typescript
interface GemsTableColumn {
  field: string;           // key in the row object
  header: string;          // column header text
  type?: 'text' | 'badge' | 'actions' | 'document';
  sortable?: boolean;
  sortParam?: string;      // backend sort parameter (defaults to field)
  docTypeField?: string;   // for document type columns
  badgeColors?: Record<string, { bg: string; text: string }>;
}
```

**Action model:**
```typescript
interface GemsTableAction {
  icon: string;
  tooltip: string;
  colorClass?: string;
  actionName: string;
  visible?: (row: GemsTableRow) => boolean;
}
```

**Outputs:** `pageChange` emits `GemsPageable { page, size, sort }`.
`actionClick` emits `{ action: string; row: GemsTableRow }`.

### 7.2 gems-badge
```html
<gems-badge label="Ativo" variant="success" icon="fa-solid fa-check"></gems-badge>
```
**Variants:** `neutral`, `success`, `warning`, `danger`, `info`, `primary`.

### 7.3 gems-empty-state
```html
<gems-empty-state
  icon="fa-solid fa-inbox"
  title="Nenhum registro"
  description="Tente ajustar os filtros."
  actionLabel="Adicionar"
  (actionClick)="onCreate()">
</gems-empty-state>
```

### 7.4 gems-card-list-select
Visual card-based selection component.

---

## 8. FEEDBACK & OVERLAY

### 8.1 gems-modal
```html
<gems-modal [(open)]="isOpen" title="Confirmar exclusão" size="sm">
  <p>Tem certeza que deseja excluir?</p>
  <div gems-modal-footer>
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="isOpen = false">Cancelar</button>
    <button class="btn-save" (click)="confirmDelete()">Confirmar</button>
  </div>
</gems-modal>
```
**Inputs:** `open` (two-way model), `title`, `size` (sm|md|lg),
`closeOnBackdrop`. Closes on ESC key automatically.

### 8.2 GemsAlertService (SweetAlert2)
```typescript
constructor(private alertService: GemsAlertService) {}

// Success
this.alertService.success('Sucesso!', 'Registro salvo.');

// Error
this.alertService.error('Erro', 'Falha ao processar.');

// Error from API response
this.alertService.errorFromApi(err);

// Confirm dialog
const result = await this.alertService.confirm('Excluir?', 'Esta ação é irreversível.');
if (result.isConfirmed) { /* proceed */ }

// Warning / Info
this.alertService.warning('Atenção', 'Dados incompletos.');
this.alertService.info('Informação', 'Novo recurso disponível.');
```

### 8.3 GemsToastService
```typescript
constructor(private toastService: GemsToastService) {}

this.toastService.success('Salvo com sucesso!');
this.toastService.error('Erro ao processar.', { duration: 6000 });
this.toastService.info('Novidade disponível.');
this.toastService.warning('Verifique os dados.');
```
**Prerequisite:** add `<gems-toast-container></gems-toast-container>` in app root.

### 8.4 gems-loading (Full-page spinner)
```html
<!-- app.component.html -->
<gems-loading></gems-loading>
```
Controlled by `GemsLoadingService` (show/hide/forceHide).
Auto-triggered by `gemsLoadingInterceptor` on every HTTP request.

---

## 9. NAVIGATION & LAYOUT

### 9.1 gems-side-menu
```html
<gems-side-menu
  [config]="menuConfig"
  [userName]="'Admin'"
  [userEmail]="'admin@app.com'"
  [userInitials]="'AD'"
  (logoutClick)="logout()">
</gems-side-menu>
```

**Config model:**
```typescript
interface GemsSideMenuConfig {
  headerLogoUrl?: string;
  headerTitle?: string;
  items: GemsSideMenuItem[];
}

interface GemsSideMenuItem {
  label: string;
  icon?: string;      // FontAwesome class
  route?: string;     // Angular router path
  roles?: string[];   // Keycloak roles for visibility
  children?: GemsSideMenuItem[];
  isExpanded?: boolean;
}
```

### 9.2 gems-tabs
```html
<gems-tabs [tabs]="tabs" [(activeId)]="activeTab">
  @if (activeTab === 'dados') { <app-dados /> }
  @if (activeTab === 'config') { <app-config /> }
</gems-tabs>
```
**Tab model:** `GemsTab { id: string; label: string; icon?: string; disabled?: boolean }`.

### 9.3 gems-wizard
```html
<gems-wizard [steps]="steps" [currentStep]="step" (stepChange)="onStep($event)">
</gems-wizard>
```
**Step model:** `GemsWizardStep { label: string; icon?: string }`.
Steps before `currentStep` are clickable (back navigation).

---

## 10. HTTP & STATE MANAGEMENT

### 10.1 GemsBaseStore (abstract service)
```typescript
@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })
export class UserStore extends GemsBaseStore {
  constructor() { super('users'); } // controller path → /api/users

  findAll(pageable: GemsPageable) {
    return this.get<Page<User>>('', { pageable });
  }

  findById(id: number) {
    return this.get<User>(`${id}`);
  }

  create(user: User) {
    return this.post<User, User>('', user);
  }

  update(id: number, user: User) {
    return this.put<User, User>(`${id}`, user);
  }

  remove(id: number) {
    return this.delete<void>(`${id}`);
  }
}
```
Provides: `get`, `post`, `put`, `delete`, `patch`.
> **Change from 1.0.x:** the Keycloak Bearer token is **no longer** attached automatically
> by `GemsBaseStore`. It is attached by the interceptor registered via `provideGemsKeycloak`
> (see section 11) — that provider requires `provideHttpClient(withInterceptorsFromDi())`.

### 10.2 GEMS_API_URL token / provideGemsHttp
Prefer the `provideGemsHttp` helper, imported from the package root:
```typescript
import { provideGemsHttp } from '@gabriel-mdias/angular-gems-sdk';

providers: [
  provideGemsHttp('https://api.example.com'),
]
```
Equivalent low-level form:
```typescript
providers: [
  { provide: GEMS_API_URL, useValue: 'https://api.example.com' },
]
```
If `GEMS_API_URL` is missing, `GemsBaseStore` now throws a descriptive error instead of failing silently.

### 10.3 GemsPageable
```typescript
interface GemsPageable {
  page?: number;
  size?: number;
  sort?: string[]; // e.g. ["name,asc", "createdAt,desc"]
}
```

---

## 11. AUTH (Keycloak)

> **BREAKING in 1.1.0:** all auth exports moved to the secondary entry point
> `@gabriel-mdias/angular-gems-sdk/auth` — `gemsRoleGuard`, `GemsHasRoleDirective`,
> and the new `provideGemsKeycloak` are NOT exported from the package root anymore.

### 11.1 Setup (app.config.ts)
```typescript
import { provideHttpClient, withInterceptorsFromDi } from '@angular/common/http';
import { provideGemsKeycloak } from '@gabriel-mdias/angular-gems-sdk/auth';

export const appConfig: ApplicationConfig = {
  providers: [
    provideHttpClient(withInterceptorsFromDi()),
    provideGemsKeycloak({
      config: { url: 'https://auth.example.com', realm: 'my-realm', clientId: 'my-client' },
      initOptions: {
        onLoad: 'check-sso',
        silentCheckSsoRedirectUri: window.location.origin + '/silent-check-sso.html',
      },
    }),
  ],
};
```
The JWT bearer token is attached to outgoing HTTP requests by the interceptor
registered inside `provideGemsKeycloak` — NOT automatically by `GemsBaseStore`
(see section 10.1). `provideHttpClient(withInterceptorsFromDi())` is required
for that DI-based interceptor to run.

### 11.2 Route guard
```typescript
import { gemsRoleGuard } from '@gabriel-mdias/angular-gems-sdk/auth';

{
  path: 'admin',
  canActivate: [gemsRoleGuard],
  data: { roles: ['ADMIN'], roleMode: 'any' }, // 'any' (default) | 'all'
  loadComponent: () => import('./admin.component').then(m => m.AdminComponent),
}
```

### 11.3 Structural directive
```html
<button *gemsHasRole="'ADMIN'" class="btn-danger">Excluir</button>
<div *gemsHasRole="['EDITOR', 'ADMIN']">Conteúdo restrito</div>
<div *gemsHasRole="['A', 'B']; mode: 'all'">Só com os dois papéis</div>
```
Selector: `*gemsHasRole`. Optional `mode` (`'any'` default | `'all'`) controls whether
any or all of the given roles are required.

---

## 12. UTILITY SERVICES

### 12.1 GemsNavigationService
```typescript
constructor(private nav: GemsNavigationService) {}

// Navigate with data
this.nav.navigateWithData(['/edit', id], { entity: myObj });

// Consume data on the target page
const data = this.nav.consumeRouteData<MyType>();

// Go back (session-based history)
this.nav.back();
```

### 12.2 GemsSessionService
```typescript
constructor(private session: GemsSessionService) {}

this.session.setItem('key', { complex: 'object' });
const val = this.session.getItem<MyType>('key');
this.session.removeItem('key');
this.session.clear();
```
SSR-safe (checks `isPlatformBrowser` internally).

---

## 13. COMPLETE FORM EXAMPLE

```typescript
@Component({
  selector: 'app-user-form',
  standalone: true,
  imports: [
    ReactiveFormsModule,
    GemsFormCardComponent,
    GemsInputTextComponent,
    GemsInputDateComponent,
    GemsInputMaskComponent,
    GemsInputDocumentComponent,
    GemsSelectComponent,
    GemsTextareaComponent,
    GemsInputCheckboxComponent,
    GemsFieldErrorComponent,
  ],
  templateUrl: './user-form.component.html',
})
export class UserFormComponent {
  constructor(
    private fb: FormBuilder,
    private alertService: GemsAlertService,
    private toastService: GemsToastService,
  ) {}

  readonly statusOptions: GemsSelectOption[] = [
    { label: 'Ativo', value: 'ACTIVE' },
    { label: 'Inativo', value: 'INACTIVE' },
  ];

  readonly form = this.fb.group({
    name:      ['', Validators.required],
    email:     ['', [Validators.required, Validators.email]],
    birthDate: [''],
    phone:     ['', Validators.required],
    document:  ['', Validators.required],
    status:    ['ACTIVE', Validators.required],
    notes:     [''],
    active:    [true],
  });

  async save(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.form.invalid) {
      this.form.markAllAsTouched();
      return;
    }
    this.toastService.success('Salvo com sucesso!');
  }
}
```

```html
<gems-form-card title="Cadastro de Usuário" icon="fa-solid fa-user-plus">
  <form [formGroup]="form">
    <gems-input-text label="Nome" formControlName="name" icon="fa-solid fa-user" [required]="true"></gems-input-text>
    <gems-field-error [control]="form.get('name')"></gems-field-error>

    <gems-input-text label="E-mail" formControlName="email" type="email" icon="fa-solid fa-envelope" [required]="true"></gems-input-text>
    <gems-field-error [control]="form.get('email')"></gems-field-error>

    <gems-input-date label="Data de Nascimento" formControlName="birthDate" format="dayMonthYear"></gems-input-date>

    <gems-input-mask label="Telefone" formControlName="phone" maskType="phone" [required]="true"></gems-input-mask>
    <gems-field-error [control]="form.get('phone')"></gems-field-error>

    <gems-input-document label="CPF/CNPJ" formControlName="document" [required]="true"></gems-input-document>
    <gems-field-error [control]="form.get('document')"></gems-field-error>

    <gems-select label="Status" formControlName="status" [options]="statusOptions" [required]="true"></gems-select>
    <gems-field-error [control]="form.get('status')"></gems-field-error>

    <gems-textarea label="Observações" formControlName="notes" [rows]="4" [maxlength]="500"></gems-textarea>

    <gems-input-checkbox label="Ativo" formControlName="active"></gems-input-checkbox>
  </form>

  <div gems-form-card-footer>
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="cancel()">Cancelar</button>
    <button class="btn-save" (click)="save()">Salvar</button>
  </div>
</gems-form-card>
```

---

## 14. COMPLETE TABLE + SEARCH EXAMPLE

```typescript
@Component({
  selector: 'app-user-list',
  standalone: true,
  imports: [
    ReactiveFormsModule,
    GemsFormCardComponent,
    GemsInputTextComponent,
    GemsSelectComponent,
    GemsTableComponent,
    GemsEmptyStateComponent,
  ],
  templateUrl: './user-list.component.html',
})
export class UserListComponent {
  constructor(private userStore: UserStore) {}

  readonly columns: GemsTableColumn[] = [
    { field: 'name', header: 'Nome', sortable: true },
    { field: 'email', header: 'E-mail', sortable: true },
    { field: 'document', header: 'Documento', type: 'document' },
    { field: 'status', header: 'Status', type: 'badge', badgeColors: {
      ACTIVE: { bg: '#dcfce7', text: '#166534' },
      INACTIVE: { bg: '#fee2e2', text: '#991b1b' },
    }},
  ];

  readonly actions: GemsTableAction[] = [
    { actionName: 'edit', icon: 'fa-solid fa-pen', tooltip: 'Editar' },
    { actionName: 'delete', icon: 'fa-solid fa-trash', tooltip: 'Excluir', colorClass: 'danger' },
  ];

  rows: any[] = [];
  total = 0;
  page = 0;
  size = 10;
  loading = false;

  onPageChange(pageable: GemsPageable): void {
    this.page = pageable.page ?? 0;
    this.size = pageable.size ?? 10;
    this.loadData(pageable);
  }

  onAction(event: { action: string; row: any }): void {
    if (event.action === 'edit') { /* navigate */ }
    if (event.action === 'delete') { /* confirm and delete */ }
  }
}
```

---

## 15. ICONS

The SDK uses **Font Awesome 6** (free solid/regular). All `icon` inputs expect
a FA class string like `'fa-solid fa-user'` or `'fa-regular fa-envelope'`.
Never use Material Icons or other icon libraries unless explicitly told.

Setup (required, or icons render as empty boxes):
```bash
npm install @fortawesome/fontawesome-free
```
```json
"styles": [
  "node_modules/@fortawesome/fontawesome-free/css/all.min.css",
  "src/styles.css"
]
```
The **Inter** font is optional — load it via Google Fonts or `@fontsource/inter` if desired.

---

END OF DOCUMENT
